# Roadmap

## Active Phase
v0

## v0 - Core Transfer Loop
- Start/stop host server
- Select shared root folders
- Browser directory listing
- File download
- Path traversal protection
- Host status + open-mode warning

## v1 - MVP Beta
- QR share
- mDNS discovery
- Better UI + progress
- Session PIN
- Multi-platform packaging quality

## v2 - Security and Productivity
- Trusted devices
- Upload flow
- Read/write policies
- Logs and session control

## v3 - Power User
- CLI mode
- WebDAV mode
- Extensibility and automation
